description_long: This is a freestanding advertising board mounted on a single vertical pole with a square base for stability. The board itself is rectangular and double-sided, featuring printed advertisements on both faces. One side displays a colorful promotion for the Magnit supermarket chain, including a car image and Russian text, while the reverse side has a bold red and white design with the Magnit logo and a slogan. The frame appears to be made of metal or painted wood, with a smooth, hard surface and no visible illumination features. The pole is slender and metallic, supporting the board at a comfortable viewing height for pedestrians. The overall construction suggests durability for outdoor urban environments.
description: A double-sided, pole-mounted advertising board with printed Magnit supermarket ads, supported by a square base and designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a detailed Magnit supermarket advertisement with a car image and promotional text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the board and the supporting pole, with minimal visible details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a bold red and white Magnit logo and slogan, with a simpler design than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and structural pole, similar to view 1.
attribute_frame_design: thin metal frame with straight edges and no decorative elements
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed posters for Magnit supermarket, including promotional graphics and text
